process.title: From discovery to launch, with no invisible stages.
process.body: Every phase has a clear objective, a concrete deliverable and an approval point.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We understand the business, offer, audience and what needs to improve.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.body: We define the message, structure, journey and priorities for the page.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We create the visual direction and validate the experience across key screens.

steps.title: Development
steps.body: We turn the design into a fast, accessible and responsive implementation.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We review content, devices and configuration before putting the project live.

caseStudy.title: NUPPAC: a digital presence built to present, teach and sell.
caseStudy.intro: The project brought together corporate content, courses and a payment journey in a responsive experience.

facts.label: Context
facts.body: Bring the institution’s presentation and course offering together in one environment.

facts.label: Challenge
facts.body: Create clear navigation across corporate content, course pages and registration.

facts.label: Solution
facts.body: A page system, responsive interface and flow connected to payment integration.

differentials.title: Concrete decisions instead of generic promises.
items: Design and development in one process.
Built for the business, not just a template with different content.
Mobile designed as its own experience.
Motion used to guide attention.
Scope and stages presented clearly.

about.title: A focused studio with a complete view of the project.
about.body: STANDLOUD is a digital studio created by Vitor Santana to build websites, landing pages and interactive experiences that help businesses present themselves with greater clarity, presence and personality.
about.signature: Strategy, design and code working in the same direction.

diagnostic.title: Digital presence review
diagnostic.body: Send us your website, Instagram profile or project idea. We review your current presentation and identify its main opportunities for improvement.

faq.title: What you need to know before starting.
items: How much does a website cost?
The investment depends on scope, number of pages, content and integrations. After discovery, you receive a proposal suited to the project.
How long does it take?
The timeline depends on scope and approval speed. The proposal presents the stages and an estimate before work begins.
Does STANDLOUD write the content?
We can structure the message, guide the content and develop the copy included in scope. Technical materials depend on client collaboration.
Will the website work on mobile?
Yes. Mobile is designed as its own experience and validated across different screen sizes.
Are domain and hosting included?
We can advise on and configure these services. Recurring domain, hosting or platform costs are presented separately.
Is maintenance available?
Yes. Maintenance, improvements and post-launch support can be contracted according to need.
How does payment work?
Terms are defined in the proposal according to scope and schedule, before the project begins.
Does the project belong to the client?
After completion and agreed payment, the client receives the files and access credentials specified in the contract.
